snapshot_note: Bound to WoC V2604. The batch prototype used V2510; V2604 reproduces its structure and surfaces later fix variants.

panel_b.note: Still-exposed enumeration needs a fresh b2P (blob->project). b2P V..V2605 do not index these Nov-2023 blobs, so the never-fixed set can't be listed here yet - the near-real-time thrust builds exactly this map. Proven end to end on libpixman/CVE-2022-44638: 662 projects still carried the pre-fix blob.
